meta.name: Cluster (Leiden) & top marker genes
meta.description: Leiden-cluster the preprocessed cells, then rank the genes that most differentiate each cluster and draw a dotplot of the top markers per cluster.
meta.provenance: scanpy clustering + rank_genes_groups workflow; graspologic (MIT) Leiden. Step 2 of the Xenium region-analysis workflow.

readme: Step 2 of the workflow (run 'Preprocess & QC (Xenium)' first). Leiden-clusters on the neighbours graph into `obs[cluster_key]`, ranks differentially expressed genes per cluster with the chosen test, filters to the significant ones, and draws a dotplot of the top `n_genes` markers per cluster. Follow with 'Assign cell-type labels (CellTypist)'.

params.name: cluster_key
params.tooltip: obs column to write the Leiden cluster labels into

params.name: resolution
params.tooltip: Leiden resolution: higher = more, smaller clusters

params.name: method
params.tooltip: differential-expression test used to rank marker genes

params.name: n_genes
params.tooltip: top marker genes per cluster shown in the dotplot
